chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-285 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.1324/23 2. For orders on Misc. No.1325/23 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 01.12.2023 None present. -.-.- This petition is pending since 10.01.2023 and was fixed thrice and on all three occasions including today petitioner is called absent. It appears that she has lost interest in the proceedings. Petition as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
